title: BRIO | Shiny Blades [3D Weapons] [COPPER AGE UPDATE]
description: Bring some brio to your world! With weapons redesign.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a209c9d8580129f224f30b7fcc6b3d48bfc1163b.png)

# [CHECK ALSO 3D TOOLS](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/brio-shiny-tools)

**DESCRIPTION**

[Model gap fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modelfix) reccomended

Requires EMF and ETF [(EMF Download)](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) [(ETF Download)](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)

Actually you still can play on vanilla with that pack, but trident and arrow models will remain unchanged.

That pack is a complete weapons redesign with new 3D models, exclusive features and animations. All in one style, that fits vanilla perfectly. Each weapon developed as an unique piece with his own special features. 

Main feature of this RP is 2D GUI icons of items, but 3D models in hands and frames. Each item have its own unique display position in item frame, so that they can be not only an "item in frame", but actually a nice decoration.

- High quality, stylish, detailed Vanilla-like 16x16 resourcepack
- 2D GUI icons
- 3D models in hand
- Unique item frames display for each weapon
- Unique display if equipped in helmet slot for melee weapon and arrows
- Unique effects like light emissive elements, colored outlines and animations (more in future!)

![Copper sword and tools](https://i.ibb.co.com/CpgCtCxr/mainpage-pixelated-c.png)
![Colored shield icons](https://i.ibb.co.com/Nn1YTNL3/mainpage-pixelated-shields.png)
![Changed items showcase](https://i.ibb.co.com/4ncR3tjc/mainpage-1.png)

<details>
<summary>PLANS</summary>

- More animations
- Some retexture
- Visible damage and enchantments
- Hold my items support

</details>

<details>
<summary>TECH SUMMARY AND WARNINGS</summary>

v1.1.0

- Bow doesn't work properly below 1.21.6

v1.0.0

- Tested on FORGE (EMF ETF) 1.21.4-1.21.8. Everything works properly.
- Tested on FABRIC (FAPI EMF ETF) 1.21.4-1.21.8. Everything works properly.
- Tested on Optifine 1.21.4 AND 1.21.8. CEM doesn't work properly. I do not recommend.

</details>

**CREDITS**

Thanks for the glow shader!
https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tools-and-utils?version=1.21.8
